prestazioni: Forced induction conversion using a Garrett GT4202R turbocharger (64mm inducer) on the 4.6L Modular V8 (engine code: 4V-281, 2-valve SOHC), paired with a custom cast-aluminum intake manifold (Edelbrock #3879) and a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to handle 12 psi of boost while maintaining 93-octane compatibility

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap (utilizing a custom bellhousing adapter from G-Force Transmissions) and a Ford 9-inch rear end with 3.73:1 gears, Strange Engineering S-trac differential, and 35-spline axles to handle 550+ lb-ft of torque

Suspension overhaul with Air Lift Performance 3P management (dual compressors, 5-gallon tank) and custom-valved Bilstein B16 coilovers (adjusted for 2,500 lb rear air springs) to enable a 4-inch drop while maintaining load capacity, paired with polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension #9.5101G) and a Hellwig 7685 sway bar for chassis rigidity
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PB-S01 widebody kit (modified for Town Car chassis) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (12-inch flares) and a 3-piece front splitter (VIS Racing #VL-010) to accommodate 20x10 ET+12 BBS LM-R wheels (gold finish) wrapped in 275/30R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Custom rear valence with integrated quad-exit exhaust (Stainless Works 3-inch mandrel-bent system, ceramic-coated) and a functional carbon fiber diffuser (Seibon #LIN-TC-01) to reduce lift at speed, paired with a shaved trunk lid (no Lincoln emblem) and a custom LED taillight conversion (Lux H8 V4, sequential turn signals)

Interior rework featuring Recaro SR-7F seats (custom-molded to Town Car floor pans) with 4-point Schroth harnesses, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, and a full Alcantara headliner (EuroComp Designs) with custom door cards (retrimmed in black Nappa leather with red contrast stitching and CNC-machined aluminum door pulls)
